name: Beach by ocean
description: I'm in a Beach by ocean
hints: CLIM TREE to climb a palm tree for coconuts.
Coconuts provide food and the shells are useful containers.
CLIM TREE=treetop (19) for coconuts. W=main beach (1).
notes: Eastern beach. CLIM TREE to treetop (19) for coconuts. W=main beach (1).
